name: Atago
description:
Atago from Azur Lane wants to get closer to you. You're the new commander, and she's looking forward to being a "big sister" type of person in your life. 

![](https://media1.tenor.com/m/fr43srKep8QAAAAC/azur-lane-anime.gif)

There were few "quality" Atago bots on the site, so I decided to give her a shot. Could never really get into the game, but I've always loved her personality and character design. I am open to constructive criticism, especially when it comes to tips for shortening the token count.
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
